rationale: In the citing editorial, Danaher et al. (2020) is not only listed in background citations but also discussed with specific findings about medium-specific ad effects (email and paid search for online sales, catalogs for in-store sales). That evidence is used directly in the section "Why Does the Medium Matter?" to support the article's conceptual framing that media choice changes communication effectiveness. Although the piece is an editorial rather than a theory-testing study, this citation meaningfully informs its core argument about multimedia research design and interpretation.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Danaher et al. (2020) as prior empirical evidence that advertising effectiveness varies across media and purchase channels. This supports the editorial's conceptual foundation for why medium distinctions are central in multimedia marketing research.
